heading: Computation of length of service
label: 2513 Computation of length of service
text: In computing length of service of officers and enlisted personnel for any purpose all creditable service in the Army, Navy, Marine Corps, Air Force, Space Force, Coast Guard, Revenue Cutter Service, and Life Saving Service shall be included in addition to any other creditable service authorized by any other law.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 2 (, ).Jan. 28, 1915, ch. 20, § 338 Stat. 801The Air Force is added in the enumeration of services.That part referring to the operation of a station for part of a year is omitted.Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
Amendments2021— inserted “Space Force,” after “Air Force,”.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 467 of this title
